/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/sfml_test.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/sfml_test.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sfml_test.dir/src/Ball.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sfml_test.dir/src/Platform.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sfml_test.dir/src/engine/ColliderComponent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sfml_test.dir/src/engine/Engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sfml_test.dir/src/engine/scenes/PhysicsScene.cpp.o -o sfml_test  _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-graphics-s-d.a _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-window-s-d.a _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-system-s-d.a -lrt /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXrandr.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXcursor.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXrender.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXfixes.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXi.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXext.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libX11.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libudev.so -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfreetype.so
